label: About
title: About Cutaway Noise Vessel
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 105 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 7 source windows around Real American Noise and Anchor image material 3, plus 5 more. A source image from realamericannoise.org helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Cutaway Noise Vessel: Architectural section of a centered cutaway noise vessel floating in black void: a dark metal frame, translucent square mesh face, oxblood vertical strata, and one dirty off-white cavity where muted-yellow conduits knot through a slot. Use hard crop logic, frame thickness, screws, buried stamp fragments, red leak ac... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 7 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large glowing perforated mesh cabinet face, stepped lower-right glass-and-cable vitrine, and buried printed sleeve patch behind mesh.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
